name: Kavyanjali
description: Established in 2014, KIET-Kavyanjali stands as a beacon of literary excellence within KIET, dedicated to fostering a vibrant multilingual literary culture among its student body. Through a variety of events and initiatives, KIET-Kavyanjali strives to keep the flame of literature burning brightly, providing a stage for budding talents to showcase their creativity and vast thinking. From Kavi-Sammelans to online poetry competitions, the club has become an integral part of campus life, attracting both renowned poets and emerging wordsmiths alike, with a focus on languages like Hindi and Urdu.
